arts.ttl: West Ham players to show support for hospitalized Antonio before Wolves match in Premier League
arts.sum: The players will warm up in “Antonio 9” jerseys and walk on to the field in tops adorning his name, West Ham said. West Ham players will show their support for teammate Michail Antonio following his serious injury in a car crash by wearing items of clothing bearing the striker’s name ahead of the Premier League game against Wolverhampton on Monday.

arts.ttl: Manager Gary Lineker called 'Very Talented' ready to take West Ham job until end of May - report
arts.sum: Graham Potter is now ready to take the West Ham job until the end of the season initially, according to talkSPORT. The news outlet reported... The post Manager Gary Lineker called 'Very Talented' ready to take West Ham job until end of May - report appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui future: West Ham United 'hold meeting' with Serie A winner
arts.sum: West Ham United allegedly hold discussions with a Serie A title winner as they continue to assess the position of current boss Julen Lopetegui.

arts.ttl: Michail Antonio latest as concerning update emerges after West Ham star's car crash
arts.sum: West Ham United's Michail Antonio is facing an uncertain future in football after a severe car accident on Saturday led to surgery for a lower limb fracture. In an official statement, the club said: "West Ham United can confirm Michail Antonio has undergone surgery on a lower limb fracture following a road traffic accident on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: West Ham host Wolves in a pivotal test for both managers
arts.sum: West Ham host Wolverhampton Wanderers at the London Stadium in an important clash for the managers of the two struggling teams.

arts.ttl: Michail Antonio update, best-case scenario and first words after horror crash
arts.sum: Michail Antonio is in a stable condition in hospital and communicating following his horror car crash but there have been fears he might not play football again after undergoing surgery to a fractured lower limb
